## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Check what applies and add steps. -->

- [ ] Lint / build pass locally (`npm run lint`, `npm run build`)
- [ ] Tested on desktop
- [ ] Tested on mobile (if UI change)
- [ ] Screenshots / recording attached (if UI change)

## Notes (optional)

<!-- Breaking changes, follow-ups, related tickets, rollout notes. -->

---

### Title format (required)

Use Conventional Commits:

```text
<type>(optional-scope): <short summary>
```

Allowed types: `feat` `fix` `docs` `style` `refactor` `perf` `test` `build` `ci` `chore` `revert`

Examples:

- `feat: add consultation booking flow`
- `fix(auth): redirect expired sessions to login`
- `ci: tighten deploy concurrency`
